Cybersecurity Internship

Responsibilities
Monitor security logs and investigate alerts using Splunk.
Document incident response findings and support vulnerability management.

Required Qualifications
Currently pursuing a bachelor's degree in cybersecurity or computer science.
Experience with Python, Linux, network security, and Git.
Security+ required.

Preferred Qualifications
Familiar with Wireshark, SIEM, and the MITRE ATT&CK framework.
Strong communication and attention to detail.
